text: Wandering through these dimly-lit rooms, I feel both curiosity and dislocation. The purple glow beyond the glass in the first scene feels otherworldly, as if I’ve stumbled upon a secret gathering or the threshold of a digital realm. In the second scene, encountering bold words and technological artifacts on colored walls, I sense an interplay of artifice and intellect; a space designed for both reflection and innovation. I’m intrigued by the themes of research and development, but also slightly disoriented, as if time and meaning have become fluid in this experimental environment.
